triggers.name: Feign death ended
triggers.comments: Wear-off of the necro Feign Death spell (id 366); also fires when standing from spell FD.

triggers.name: Pet root broke
triggers.pattern: ^Your pet's (Ghoul Root|Root) spell has worn off\.
triggers.comments: Verified in Legends log: 'Your pet's Ghoul Root spell has worn off.' (necro pet Ghoul Root — 154 hits in fixtures/local/eqlog_Nyasha_oggok; the plain pet 'Root' form also appears). Spoken because a broken pet-root means the mob is now loose and a pet-CC necro must react. The existing class/shaman/cc/root-broken only matches the player's own '^Your root spell has worn off.' and excludes the "pet's"-prefixed line, so pet roots were previously unalerted. Spam audit: bursts during grinding but ~a few/hr sustained; keep speak on for the pet-tank necro playstyle.
